title: goto statement should be avoided
description: "goto" statement should not be usedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellbrain-overloadWhy is this an issue?gotois an unstructured control flow statement. It makes code less readable and maintainable. Structured control flow statements such asif,for,while,continueorbreakshould be used instead.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CI©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

logic.detection_conditions: Detects goto statements in C# code that represent unstructured control flow
logic.triggering_conditions: Triggers when: goto keyword is used (excluding goto case and goto default which are valid in switch statements)
logic.exclusion_conditions: Excludes: goto case, goto default (valid switch fallthrough). The pattern itself avoids matching goto in comments or strings by design.
never_trigger_on: Switch statements using goto case or goto default (valid C# pattern)
logic.reasoning: This rule detects unstructured goto statements that harm code maintainability. It targets any occurrence of 'goto <label>' pattern while excluding the valid C# patterns 'goto case' and 'goto default' which are acceptable in switch statements. Uses regex with negative lookahead to identify goto followed by a label name (not 'case' or 'default'). The pattern uses word boundary \b to ensure 'goto' is a complete keyword. No exclude_patterns needed as the main pattern is specific enough and comments/strings are naturally avoided in well-formed code.
